scope.purpose: incremental official/high-trust source audit before any database or candidate promotion

safety.openPullRequestCheck: Open PR check found only non-overlapping report-generator PR #111 before branch creation; no open PL Athlete Research data PR for this lot range was found.
safety.duplicateCheck: No existing data/research-batches file for lot81-84 audit-run60 was found before creation.
safety.noInferencePolicy: No achievements, same-person identity links, or record claims were inferred beyond rows directly visible in official HPA PDFs. 2025 rows for Lot82-84 are documented in this audit only and not promoted to data/database.json in this run.

sourceChecks.name: Repository main database skeleton
sourceChecks.usedFor: Confirmed roster identities, lot numbers, aliases, and v5.9.6_LOCK preservation target.

sourceChecks.name: GitHub open pull request search
sourceChecks.usedFor: Checked for open overlapping PL Athlete Research PRs before branch creation; found only non-overlapping PR #111.

sourceChecks.name: HPA official 2026 Numata Bench Press速報 F/G PDF
sourceChecks.usedFor: Confirmed Lot81-84 current-event bench press rows, attempts, bodyweight, team, class, placement, and points.

sourceChecks.name: HPA official 2025 Hokkaido-Tohoku Block Bench Press result PDF
sourceChecks.usedFor: Checked prior single bench press histories for Lot81-84; row-level official matches were located for Lot82-84.

sourceChecks.name: HPA official 2026 Spring Ebetsu PL result PDF
sourceChecks.usedFor: Checked domestic Hokkaido three-lift PL rows for Lot81-84; no matching text rows were found for this small batch.

sourceChecks.name: IPF/Goodlift/JPA broad web checks
sourceChecks.usedFor: Romanized-name and exact-name checks for national/international/world histories; no reliable additional row was captured in this batch.

result.summary: Lot 81-84 were audited as a small batch. HPA official 2026 Numata current-event rows were confirmed for all four athletes; HPA official 2025 Hokkaido-Tohoku Block Bench Press prior rows were confirmed in-audit for Lot82-84. No database or candidate file was changed in order to keep this PR limited to a safe, internally consistent audit log.
